claim_bullets.bullet_text: Physical Enchant subdivided into six spells: Sharpness, Dullness, Quickness, Slowness, Strength, and Weakness (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.68-82).

source_record_text: This section details a list of ancient magic spells, focusing on Physical Enchant and various 4th, 5th, and 6th level spells. Spells are categorized by their effects and levels, with specific details on cost, area, duration, and effects. Unknown aspects of spell interactions are noted.
